title: Disability Services Support Playbook for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: A guest with a disability requests assistance or accommodation.

steps.title: Initial Guest Interaction
steps.action: Greet the guest warmly and inquire about specific needs or assistance required. Ensure communication is clear and respectful.

next_steps.condition: Guest requires visual or auditory assistance

steps.title: Provide Mobility Assistance
steps.action: Offer a wheelchair or other mobility aids. Escort the guest to their room or desired location, ensuring all pathways are accessible.

steps.title: Provide Visual or Auditory Assistance
steps.action: Offer braille menus or visual aids. If needed, provide a staff member to assist with navigation or communication.

steps.title: Room Accommodation Check
steps.action: Ensure the guest's room is equipped with necessary accessibility features such as grab bars, lowered switches, and emergency communication devices.

steps.title: Follow-Up and Feedback
steps.action: Contact the guest after initial assistance to ensure their needs are met and gather feedback for service improvement.

description: This playbook outlines the steps for hotel staff to effectively support guests with disabilities, ensuring a comfortable and accessible experience.
prerequisites: Availability of accessibility tools and aids
escalation_path: If guest needs are not met, escalate to the Duty Manager for immediate resolution.
